violations.text: Cheese was observed held at 43-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved cheese to walk-in cooler to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Deli display case (cheese section) was not in good repair, ambient observed at 43F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. Establishment to not store TCS foods in unit until serviced and reaches an ambient temperature of 41F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Raw chicken was observed stored above raw BBQ sirloin tips in the retail refrigerator. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Deli meats and cheese observed held at 44-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview with PIC, Food was in unit less than 4 hours, foods were moved to another unit at time of inspection. Unit was on defrost at time of inspection, proof unit reaches 41F or below to be sent to inspector prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Food was observed held at 45-48 degrees Fahrenheit in the bakery open air cooler #1. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the unit for more than 4 hours. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 40 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Bakery open air cooler #1 was taken out of service at time of inspection and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Unit must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

Breakfast sausage was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit in the meat chest cooler #2. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, breakfast sausage had been out of temperature for an unknown amount of time. Breakfast sausage was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. An employee turned down the temperature of the unit and the unit dropped down to an ambient air temperature of 40 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Unit must be monitored. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

Cheddar cheese was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit in the cheese open air cooler in the produce area. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, cheese had been out of temperature for an unknown amount of time. Cheese was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Cold hold unit must be monitored. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

Self-serve bagels and muffins are lacking label information in the bakery department. Food in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Per person in charge, a book with the label information will be made available to customers and placed with the bagels and muffins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the plastic honeycomb panel above the produce have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

The floor behind the fryolator and 3-bay sink area has an accumulation of grease in the deli department. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
Observed paper towel dispenser and soap dispenser located near mop sinks in the back storage and produce prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2023
Condensate observed dripping on ready to eat strawberries in the produce walk in cooler.PIC voluntarily disposed of strawberries Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

Chemicals such as spray bottles was stored near single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

Employees beverage was observed being store in online department refrigerator. Employees personal items may not be stored with food meant for retail sale. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
Utensils were observed being stored in between the wall and knife rack in bakery. Utensils must be stored in a clean and dry area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package on storage shelves in the bakery area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2023
The water drinking fountain located in the back storage area was not in good repair(observed leak). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair(produce cooler). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following had an accumulation of debris: -racks in bakery observed food residue. -racks, storage shelves, wrap machine in meat department accumulation of dirt, and food residue -honeycomb vents in poultry open case cooler observed with biofilm -vents in bakery dept had accumulation of dusts. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment(meat grinders) or items were observed in the meat department area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2023

The following area were observed in poor repair: Several light shields in the several walk in coolers(observed crack). Metal lifting on back door storage area to outside. Tiles in the bakery area(cracks) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
The ceiling in the bakery area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023

The following areas in the physical facilities were observed with debris:1.floors and walls in the meat cooler, seafood department, back area near produce cooler was observed with an accumulation soil and food residue3.ceilings in the bakery had an accumulation of dust4.fans in the meat cooler, in seafood department, bakery cooler, and walk in dairy walk in cooler has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
